rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

colors.background: Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) - Maps to `bg-neutral-950` or custom HSL.
colors.success: Neon Green (#39FF14) - Use sparingly for 'Available' slots

grid_strategy.description: Dense data correlation for turf availability schedules. Every pixel utilized. Sharp corners or max 8px radius.

surface_strategies.cards: Tactical Minimalism. No soft shadows. Use 1px solid borders (border-white/10) with flat Deep Obsidian backgrounds.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid black background (bg-black/90) with a sharp 1px bottom border or Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10).
surface_strategies.buttons: High-saturation primary blocks with zero border-radius (or max 4px). Hover state must increase brightness and retain high contrast text.
surface_strategies.active_states: Use 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights (ring-inset ring-2 ring-primary) to denote selected time slots.
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Only use for sticky headers or floating navs. bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and border-white/10.

animations.hover: Instant response. Scale transform disabled, prefer color shifting or hard border reveals.

components_instructions.buttons: Always explicitly define hover text color. Example: hover:bg-blue-600 hover:text-white
components_instructions.booking_grid: Use CSS Grid (grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-7 for days/times). Highlight available slots with subtle green or white border, booked slots with disabled styling (opacity-50).
components_instructions.forms: Use customized Shadcn UI forms. Inputs must have flat backgrounds, 1px border, no ring unless focused. Focus state gets Volt Blue ring.
components_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-slot-btn').

hero_background.description: Soccer field covered in green grass at night. Use with bg-black/50 to bg-black/70 overlay.

turf_listing_1.description: People playing soccer on a brightly lit field at night.

turf_listing_2.description: Boys playing soccer on a field.

turf_listing_3.description: A group of people standing on top of a lush green field.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use a dark theme by default (Archetype 2: Performance Pro). Update index.css and tailwind.config.js to enforce this.
DO NOT use generic sans-serif for headings. Implement 'Barlow Condensed' via Google Fonts.
Implement the layout with dense 'Control Room' grids for the turf booking time slots.
Ensure the hero section uses the provided hero_background image with a bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/50 to-transparent overlay so text remains completely accessible.
All cards must be flat, cardless or have max 8px border-radius, with 1px border-white/10. No soft box-shadows.
Always apply data-testid attributes to buttons, links, inputs, and major sections.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Only use it or 'DM Sans' for body text.
Force dark mode by adding 'dark' class to html/body or updating the Tailwind config to default to dark variables.
For the booking time slots grid, use 'grid-cols-4 md:grid-cols-7' and strict alignment to make it scannable like a dashboard.
